debug_info.goal: ⊢ ∃ s, s.Infinite ∧ s.Pairwise fun m n => (2 ^ ↑n - 3).Coprime (2 ^ ↑m - 3)

proof:
let a : ℕ → ℕ+ := fun n => ⟨2 ^ (n + 1), by omega⟩
  use Set.range a
  constructor
  · exact Set.infinite_range_of_injective (fun _ _ h => Nat.succ_injective (Nat.pow_right_injective (by norm_num) (by omega) (Nat.subtype.mk_eq_mk.mp h)))
  · intro x ⟨i, rfl⟩ y ⟨j, rfl⟩ hij
    simp only [a] at hij ⊢
    have h1 : 2 ^ (2 ^ (i + 1)) - 3 = (2 ^ (2 ^ i) - 1) * (2 ^ (2 ^ i) + 1) + 2 ^ (2 ^ i) - 3 := by ring
    have h2 : 2 ^ (2 ^ (j + 1)) - 3 = (2 ^ (2 ^ j) - 1) * (2 ^ (2 ^ j) + 1) + 2 ^ (2 ^ j) - 3 := by ring
    wlog h : i < j
    · exact this j i hij.symm (hij.lt_or_lt.resolve_left h)
    apply Nat.coprime_of_dvd
    intro d hd1 hd2 hdprime
    have : d ∣ 2 ^ (2 ^ i) - 3 := by
      have : 2 ^ (2 ^ (j + 1)) ≡ 2 ^ (2 ^ i) [MOD d] := by
        sorry
      sorry
    sorry
